description.en: Up to 5 logos per month, no commercial use
description.zh: 每月最多生成5个标志，不允许商业使用

description.en: Unlimited logos per month, commercial use allowed
description.zh: 每月无限生成标志，允许商业使用

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费版的自定义选项有限

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of customer support

targetAudience.en: Small businesses and individuals looking for quick and easy logo creation
targetAudience.zh: 寻求快速简便标志创建的小企业和个人

positioning.en: LogoAI positions itself as a user-friendly and efficient tool for creating professional logos with AI technology
positioning.zh: LogoAI将自己定位为一种使用AI技术创建专业标志的用户友好且高效的工具
